creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
PyPi re-organized a bunch of stuff so newer python modules can't be fetched (unless I'm misunderstanding), so we need to update bsd.site.mk to cope with this. Patch at:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D6929

(Mainly opening this bug so I can have it block some other bugs I'm about to open, to ensure they don't get committed until that patch is committed.)
